response.text:
Removed the unused functions instead of allowing dead code.

What changed
- Deleted `init_repo` from `src/daemon.rs`.
- Removed unused helpers from `src/git.rs`: `rev_list_range`, `push_force_with_lease`, `set_local_config`, `add_local_config_if_missing`, `remote_url`.

If you want, re-run `cargo check` to confirm warnings are gone.

meta.session_title: Plan for a Git-based autonomous CLI daemon with commit automation
